hero_subtitle: SFTY delivers a unified compliance operating view that reduces manual workload and strengthens audit readiness for digital asset executives managing risk and cost.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance cost escalates without unified oversight
problem_description: Executives face rising operational expense as compliance workflows remain fragmented and manual. This limits clear visibility into risk, slows audit readiness, and complicates governance across providers and regulatory changes.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates multi-provider outputs, regulatory rule updates, case workflows and audit evidence into a unified system so executives can control compliance risk, visibility and cost with scalable oversight.
workflow_title: From provider checks to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY organizes provider outputs including KYC, KYB and KYT data through structured reviews, case management, decision logging and evidence for executive risk oversight.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented workflows. Clarity for leaders
why_sfty_description: SFTY gives executives a unified compliance layer to transform disparate provider outputs into clear operational visibility, audit-ready evidence and consistent decision control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides VASP leadership with scalable compliance orchestration, audit-ready evidence, bank due diligence support and secure deployment for clearer operational risk management.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how SFTY provides leadership with compliance visibility
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports executive risk decisions

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP executives?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP executives with consolidated compliance visibility, streamlined workflows, regulatory rule monitoring, and audit-ready evidence to reduce risk and improve decision oversight across digital asset operations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY reduce compliance workload?
faq_2_answer: SFTY reduces manual tasks by connecting multiple provider outputs into connected reviews, automating routing, case creation, and policy enforcement to streamline compliance workflows and enhance operational efficiency.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence in secure, auditable records to support inspection readiness and provide a clear compliance trail for internal or external review.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY is provider-neutral and connects with existing onboarding, KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and reporting systems to connect fragmented data into one operational compliance layer.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace existing KYC, KYT or screening providers but integrates their outputs into structured workflows, cases and reports for stronger control and auditability.
final_title: Gain executive control over compliance operations
final_description: Review how SFTY connects multi-provider compliance workflows for clear risk visibility, audit readiness and cost-effective management.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
